name: Nexcom A/S
summary: Nexcom A/S, a software as a service company, engages in the development of software solutions for the automation of customer services in Denmark. Its services include digital process optimization, digital workflow, and interaction artificial intelligence and machine learning. The company also offers digital workflow platforms; eTray, a digital workflow management software; and IT related consulting services. It serves companies, such as telephony, insurance, energy, and property management, which serves large number of customers. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Karlslunde, Denmark.
